$comment: Normatively defined by the AIP Registry Interface Agent Public-Key Endpoints. Response body for GET /v1/agents/{aid}/public-key and GET /v1/agents/{aid}/public-key/{key-id}.
title: AIP Public Key Response
description: Registry response containing an agent public verification key and the validity interval needed for Credential Token and delegated Principal Token signature validation.

aid.description: Registered AID that controls this key. MUST equal the percent-decoded path aid.

key_id.description: Key version identifier without the leading '#'.

kid.description: Full DID URL key identifier. MUST equal aid + '#' + key_id.

jwk.description: Public verification key in JWK format. Ed25519 is mandatory to implement.

valid_from.description: ISO 8601 UTC timestamp at which this key version became valid for signature verification.

valid_until.description: ISO 8601 UTC timestamp after which this key version is no longer valid for newly issued signatures, or null for the current active key.

status.description: active for the current key; retired for a retained historical key replaced by ordinary rotation; compromised for a key replaced through Emergency Key Rotation. Relying Parties MUST reject Credential Tokens signed by a compromised key whose iat is at or after the key's valid_until time.
